name: Campbell Soup- Chicken Kiev
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine 1/2 cup butter, chopped parsley, minced garlic, crushed rosemary, and salt.
2. On waxed paper, form patties about 1 inch thick. Place in the freezer until firm.
3. Meanwhile, flatten chicken breasts with a meat hammer or edge of a heavy saucer to 1/4 inch thickness.
4. Cut butter into 6 equal pieces and place one in the center of each breast.
5. Tuck in the ends and roll out tightly. Secure with toothpicks or skewers.
6. Dip in beaten egg, then coat with bread crumbs.
7. Chill in the refrigerator.
8. In a saucepan, cook chopped onion with parsley in 2 tablespoons butter until tender.
9. Add cream of chicken soup, milk, and sherry to the pan. Heat, stirring occasionally.
10. Fry 2 chicken breast rolls at a time in deep fat preheated to 350°F (175°C) for 10-12 minutes until well browned.
11. Drain on absorbent paper and serve with sauce.
